scripts.cdk:synth: npm run build -w services/api && npm run build -w infra/cdk && npm run cdk -w infra/cdk -- synth Fidee-dev-MediaWaf Fidee-dev --context stage=dev
scripts.cdk:diff: npm run build -w services/api && npm run build -w infra/cdk && npm run cdk -w infra/cdk -- diff Fidee-dev-MediaWaf Fidee-dev --context stage=dev
scripts.cdk:deploy:dev: npm run build -w services/api && npm run build -w infra/cdk && npm run cdk -w infra/cdk -- deploy Fidee-dev-MediaWaf Fidee-dev --context stage=dev
scripts.cdk:diff:prod: npm run build -w services/api && npm run build -w infra/cdk && npm run cdk -w infra/cdk -- diff Fidee-prod-MediaWaf Fidee-prod --context stage=prod
